title: Dataset Builder Phase 0 Improvements — podcast playlist

episodes.title: Phase 0 improvements playlist intro: why these seven tasks are a quality staircase
episodes.blurb: Introduces the seven-task sequence as a compact quality staircase that unlocks safer later training, evaluation, and future model-assisted steps.

episodes.title: Task 1: Repair raw-data inspection for ShareGPT-style Hermes traces
episodes.blurb: Explains the implemented Task 1 improvement, why it matters, and what later steps it unlocks.

episodes.title: Task 2: Add derived structural metadata during normalization
episodes.blurb: Explains the implemented Task 2 improvement, why it matters, and what later steps it unlocks.

episodes.title: Task 3: Add explicit top-level anomaly classes
episodes.blurb: Explains the implemented Task 3 improvement, why it matters, and what later steps it unlocks.

episodes.title: Task 4: Add a lightweight coherence screen after perturbation
episodes.blurb: Explains the implemented Task 4 improvement, why it matters, and what later steps it unlocks.

episodes.title: Task 5: Make P5 and P6 more realistic
episodes.blurb: Explains the implemented Task 5 improvement, why it matters, and what later steps it unlocks.

episodes.title: Task 6: Deepen validation for first-error localization
episodes.blurb: Explains the implemented Task 6 improvement, why it matters, and what later steps it unlocks.

episodes.title: Task 7: Add build manifests and perturbation diagnostics
episodes.blurb: Explains the implemented Task 7 improvement, why it matters, and what later steps it unlocks.

episodes.title: Finale: how the implemented Phase 0 tasks reshape the next steps
episodes.blurb: Synthesizes how the seven completed tasks change the project’s readiness for later evaluation, training, and future GPU-backed extensions.

execution_recommendation.strategy: coordinator-local artifact generation plus bounded VPS batch audio rendering
execution_recommendation.why: The work is mostly deterministic file generation plus repeated make-podcast invocations. It does not benefit from stateless worker fanout, and it is small enough to run as one bounded local batch on the VPS.
notes: Use direct local execution to avoid delegation overhead on the VPS.
If audio generation takes longer than expected, run the batch in a tracked background process rather than an overnight tmux mission.
No GPU is needed for this playlist generation workflow.
